title: AtoZ My 1st Musical Car Keys Baby Toy with Light and Sound, 0+ Months, for Little Hands
features: INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Features light-up elements and engaging sound effects in a car-shaped design perfect for babies and toddlers from birth onwards
DEVELOPMENTAL TOY: Colourful key ring design helps develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and sensory exploration in young children
SAFETY FIRST: Specially sized for little hands and tiny fingers, made with smooth, rounded edges and durable materials suitable for infants
BATTERY OPERATED: Requires 3 x 1.5V AAA batteries (included) to power the entertaining light and sound features
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Introduces colours, shapes, and cause-and-effect learning through interactive play with musical sounds and lighting effects
description: Introduce your little one to the magic of music and play with the AtoZ My 1st Musical Car & Keys! Specially designed for babies from birth onwards, this delightful toy features a charming car-shaped base with colourful key attachments that are perfectly sized for tiny hands to grasp and explore. The interactive toy comes with engaging light and sound features that respond to your baby's touch, helping to develop their sensory awareness and hand-eye coordination. The set includes durable, child-safe keys in vibrant red, yellow, and green colours, attached to the main unit for easy access and to prevent loss. The friendly smiling car face design and bright colour scheme naturally draw your baby's attention, while the simple controls make it easy for them to create cause-and-effect connections. This battery-operated toy provides hours of entertaining play while supporting your baby's early developmental milestones. The ergonomic design ensures comfortable handling for those precious little fingers, making it an ideal first toy for sensory exploration and motor skill development.
